headline: Joe surges +4; James clings to 34.0.
sub: James leads on 34.0, 3 clear of Rob. The day belonged to Joe (+4), fueled by United States knocking out Teddy's Bosnia and Herzegovina in the Round of 32. Max (+2) and Jim (+2) also climbed. Out of the tournament: DR Congo (Jim), Senegal (Stev), Bosnia and Herzegovina (Teddy). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
